metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_217
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Using immuno-EM on rat hippoacampal tissue this paper demonstrates that the transmembrane receptor mGluR5 is localized at the periphery of the PSD.

9/3/2017 Pim:
-Fig 6 show quantitative support for postsynaptic membrane localizition just **outside** of the PSD membrane (so not **inside** the PSD membrane), this choice is bit arbitatry I guess. But I chosse to follow the data in figure 6.
-Since Fig.6. is on CA1 area of hippocampus I added this info to the synapse type info.
-"integral component" rerived from TM domains of GRM5.. Experimental description: from M&M: "[...] adult female Wistar rats (200-250 g) were deeply anaesthetized [...]"

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
